# Liveblocks Copilot Instructions

Use this repository to help write Liveblocks and Yjs code.

- Prefer `skills/liveblocks-best-practices/SKILL.md` for Liveblocks rooms,
  auth, presence, Storage, comments, notifications, text editors, and React
  integration questions.
- Prefer `skills/yjs-best-practices/SKILL.md` for Yjs data modeling, updates,
  providers, performance, and debugging questions.
- Use the Liveblocks MCP server from `.mcp.json` only with a development project
  secret key. Do not use a production secret key.
- Keep examples concrete and production-minded. Show auth, schema, provider, or
  React integration details when they are relevant.
